allow:
Bash('
set -euo pipefail
source scripts/lib/usage-common.sh
db_path="/users/kong/.local/share/kilo/kilo.db"
max_sessions=3
data=$(_parse_sqlite_usage "$db_path" --sessions "$max_sessions" --json)
echo "data ok, len=${#data}"

python3 -c "
import json, sys
from datetime import datetime

data = json.loads(sys.argv[1])
print(f\"loaded {len(data)} sessions\")
if not data:
    print(\"  no kilo sessions found.\")
    sys.exit(0)

def fmt(n):
    n = int(n) if isinstance(n, str) else n
    if n >= 1000000: return f\"{n/1000000:.1f}m\"
    if n >= 1000: return f\"{n/1000:.1f}k\"
    return str(n)

def fmt_date(ms):
    try:
        return datetime.fromtimestamp(ms/1000).strftime(\"%y-%m-%d %h:%m\")
    except:
        return \"unknown\"

print(\"  kilo sessions (last {}):\".format(len(data)))
for s in data:
    date = fmt_date(s[\"date\"])[:17]
    project = s[\"project\"][:21]
    title = s[\"session\"][:31]
    model = s[\"model\"][:29]
    inp = fmt(s[\"input\"])
    out = fmt(s[\"output\"])
    cache = fmt(s[\"cache_read\"] + s[\"cache_write\"])
    cost = \"\${:.4f}\".format(s[\"cost\"]/1000000)
    print(\"  {} {} {} {} {} {} {} {}\".format(date, project, title, model, inp, out, cache, cost))
" "$data"
')
